name: Week 15 Email Triage PoC - Gmail Trigger

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $json.llm_model, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.structured_query }], temperature: $json.llm_temperature, top_p: $json.llm_top_p, max_tokens: $json.llm_max_tokens, stream: false, ...($json.llm_json_mode ? { response_format: { type: 'json_schema', json_schema: { name: 'email_triage_result', strict: true, schema: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, properties: { label: { type: 'string', enum: ['normal', 'trash', 'malicious'] }, confidence: { type: 'number', minimum: 0, maximum: 1 }, reason: { type: 'string' }, indicators: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string' } }, recommended_action: { type: 'string', enum: ['allow', 'archive', 'quarantine', 'manual_review'] } }, required: ['label', 'confidence', 'reason', 'indicators', 'recommended_action'] } } } } : {}) } }}
